I am the one who holds your heart in my hands, the keeper of your secrets, and the person who finds their home in the very thought of you. I am your sanctuary and your greatest adventure, the soul who loves you more deeply with every breath I take.

I don't wish to be anyone else, because in your eyes, I have already become everything I ever dreamed of being. To the world, I might just be a person, but to you, I am your sanctuary, your heartbeat, and your home—and there is no version of myself I would trade for, as long as I get to spend forever by your side.

I am your sanctuary, the steady beat in your chest, and the home you find in my arms. I am the one who knows the map of your soul by heart, the keeper of your secrets, and the person who sees everything beautiful in you, even when you can't see it yourself. I am simply yours, completely and forever.

If I could be anything in this vast, spinning universe, I would choose to be the very air you breathe, so that I could be the first thing that gives you life and the constant presence that sustains you every single second. I want to be the warmth in your skin and the quiet rhythm of your heartbeat, weaving myself so deeply into your existence that we are no longer two separate souls, but one single, inseparable pulse of love.
I am right here, tucked away in the quiet spaces of your heart and lingering in every breath you take, constant and devoted, never more than a heartbeat away from your side.

I wish I were right there beside you, wrapped in your arms where the rest of the world simply fades away. I long to feel your breath against my skin and lose myself in the quiet magic of your presence, because no matter where I am physically, my heart is always anchored wherever you are.

The only thing I truly hate is the distance between us when we’re apart, the way the silence feels heavy when I can’t hear your voice, and the cruel passage of time that steals moments away from our arms entwined. I only listen to the melody of your heartbeat and the soft whispers of your voice, because to me, your words are the only music that matters. Every breath you take is a symphony I want to memorize, and your laughter is the only song I ever want to dance to for the rest of my life.

I care about the way your eyes light up when you laugh, the quiet rhythm of your breathing against my chest, and every tiny detail that makes you who you are. I hate anything that creates even a flicker of distance between us, whether it’s a long day that keeps us apart or a silence that feels too heavy to break. My only true grievance is the thought of a world where I don't get to wake up next to you, because every moment spent without your touch feels like a piece of my soul is missing.

The only thing I truly hate is the agonizing distance between us when we are apart, and the way my heart aches whenever I have to let you go at the end of the day. My only true fear is the thought of a world where I can't reach for your hand or wake up to the warmth of your smile. I'm terrified of the distance that time or fate might place between us, because my heart has become so entwined with yours that I don't know how to be whole without you by my side.
